forbidden.comment: Circular dependencies make code unpredictable and hard to test.
forbidden.name: no-circular

forbidden.comment: Infrastructure must not depend on application or core layers.
forbidden.name: no-infra-to-app-or-core

forbidden.comment: Application layer orchestrates core; must not reach directly into infrastructure.
forbidden.name: no-app-to-infra

forbidden.comment: Core layer must not depend on application layer.
forbidden.name: no-core-to-app

forbidden.comment: Everything in src must be reachable from the entry points (dead-code guard).
forbidden.name: no-unreachable-from-entry

forbidden.comment: Production code must not import devDependencies.
forbidden.name: not-to-dev-dep

forbidden.comment: Every import must resolve to a package.json dependency.
forbidden.name: no-non-package-json

forbidden.comment: Orphan modules are dead-code candidates (allow the public entry main.ts and type decls).
forbidden.name: no-orphans
